reviews.review_msg: He covers material in the asynchronous sessions that can't be shared afterwards, so the recordings lack key context for those who couldn't attend live. He also allows class time to be taken up by questions that would be more appropriate for email or office hours, like the reoccurring word discussion post count confusion by a select few individuals.
Did not learn anything in his class. The course content does not provide any meaningful value for skill or career development.
Close minded, only wants to hear what he wants to hear.

Closed minded and dismissive toward students. Attempts to ask questions or discuss grading were often met with hostility. Raising concerns felt risky, as there were implications that future grades could be penalized. Created an intimidating and unsupportive learning environment.
Not open minded and kinda disrespectful toward students
